key_phrases: We raised Rs 350 cr during the quarter through issuance of non-convertible debentures to fund working capital and to build sufficient liquidity
net borrowings increased to Rs 428.53 cr as on June 30, 2020 compared to a net cash balance of Rs 0.74 cr as on June 30, 2019
we have been through a compressed liquidity cycle and therefore we wanted to adequately mitigate financing and refinancing risk

we will start applying our operating cash flows to reduce the level of our gross borrowings so that by the end of the year, we reach to a level of net borrowings anywhere in the range of Rs.350 crores to Rs.400 crores
In the projects business, we would be more focused on cash realization than market share
